title: Extract publish_room_hpke_key helper — duplicated in DirectoryList and WhisperDeliver
description:
Lines 192-217 (post-create_group) and 441-468 (post-join_from_welcome) both derive room HPKE keypair and publish it with identical structure:

1. Call state.mls_client.room_hpke_keypair()
2. Set state.room_hpke_secret = Some(room_sk)
3. Send PublishHpkeKeyParams over relay
4. Handle channel close / log errors
5. Log epoch

Duplicated logic creates maintenance burden — fix in one place and risk divergence in the other. Extract into async fn publish_room_hpke_key(state, tx) and call from both sites.

Also benefits: easier to test the publish sequence independently.
close_reason: deferred to backlog; P3/P4 style issues, not blocking epic completion
